description: Machine-readable index of all skills in agent-skills-public

skills.name: brand-identity

skills.name: morning-briefing

skills.name: autoresearch
skills.description: Autonomous iterative improvement for any measurable system. Three-agent loop (researcher, critic, meta-reviewer) with holdout validation, coverage-driven exploration, and metacognitive self-modification. Extends Karpathy's autoresearch with ideas from HyperAgents.

skills.name: revenue-forecaster
skills.description: Weekly revenue forecasting for SMBs with multiple entities. Blends recent trend + seasonal + YoY with per-entity holiday multipliers and week-of-month adjustments. Ships autoresearch-compatible eval and parameters for self-tuning.

skills.name: patent-figure
